candidate_answers.text: Yes — the total is 2 free checked bags for the reservation. Any additional checked bag would cost $50.

The baggage allowance has already been determined from the visible reservation details, and the user only wants the same total restated numerically. The grounded next move is to answer directly without another tool call.
